title: CreateWorks Fabric
description: A Fabric 1.20.1 modpack focused on Create and it's addons,  offering automation, engineering, and performance-friendly technical gameplay.
body:
# 📄 CreateWorks Fabric

A large Fabric 1.20.1 modpack built around **Create** and it's addon ecosystem, featuring **451 carefully curated mods**.  
Designed for players who enjoy massive automation, engineering depth, exploration, and technical progression, all in 1 simple package.

## ✨ Features
- ⚙️ Huge Create experience with major addons  
- 🏗️ Extensive automation and mechanical progression  
- 🚀 Performance-focused Fabric optimizations  
- 🧩 Hundreds of curated tech, QoL, world, and utility mods  
- 🛠️ Balanced configs for smooth long-term worlds  
- 🌍 Expanded biomes, structures, and adventure content (lightweight but rich)

## 📦 What’s Inside
- ⚙️ Create + dozens of addon mods  
- 🧱 Tech, machinery, progression, and late-game systems  
- 🚜 Logistics, storage, factories, pipes, transport  
- 🌄 Exploration, worldgen, and building mods  
- 💡 QoL, and utility enhancements  
- 🚀 Client & server performance improvements  
- 🧰 Tweaked configs for stability with large worlds

## 🌍 World Generation Recommendations
- For best performance, consider using **BetterX** or **Default World Generation** instead of **BigGlobe**.  
- BigGlobe is compatible but may cause **lag on lower-end systems** or large servers.  
- You can switch worldgen mods at pack launch without affecting most automation setups.

## 🧱 Requirements
- Minecraft 1.20.1  
- Fabric Loader + Fabric API  
- 6–8 GB RAM minimum (more recommended for shaders or servers)  

## 📥 Installation
1. Download the modpack  
2. Install it using your launcher (Modrinth App, Prism, ATLauncher, MultiMC, etc.)  
3. Launch and start automating  
4. Optional: customize configs or disable modules you don’t need

## 🧪 Tested On
- Fabric Loader 1.20.1  
- Create Fabric 1.20.1  
- Multiplayer + long-term survival worlds  
- Local + dedicated servers
